summary: VitalFlow Iteration 7 - Post-Refactoring Verification Complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (all endpoints work after server.py split into 13 modular files). Frontend: All UI tests passed (Login forgot password flow, Register simplified B2C form, Navbar 'Painel Administrativo' button visible for Gestors, Profile lock icons for corporate users).

backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@vitalflow.com / Admin123!@# returns correct user data
GET /api/auth/me returns user info when authenticated
POST /api/auth/forgot-password generates temp password for valid email
GET /api/auth/check-domain returns personal for unknown domain
frontend: Login page: 'Esqueci minha senha' link visible
Login page: Clicking 'Esqueci minha senha' shows forgot password form
Login page: 'Voltar ao Login' button works
Register page: Title shows 'Criar Conta Pessoal'
Register page: Form has only Nome, Email, Password, Data de Nascimento
Register page: Setor and Nivel de Acesso selects NOT present (simplified B2C form)
Navbar: 'Painel Administrativo' button visible for Gestor users
Navbar: 'Painel RH' button visible for Gestor users
Profile page: Lock icon for Setor is present
Profile page: Lock icon for Cargo is present
Profile page: Lock icon for Nivel de Acesso is present
Profile page: All lock messages are present
Profile page: Nome and Data de Nascimento inputs are editable
Profile page: Setor, Cargo, Nivel de Acesso inputs are read-only (disabled)
Profile page: Save profile button visible

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - server.py (2534 lines) split into 13 modular files using APIRouter pattern
All API routes work exactly as before with /api prefix
Dashboard/Gestor endpoints work (add-employee, team-overview, export-pdf, metrics)
Frontend shows 'Painel Administrativo' button for Gestors (always visible, not hidden)
Profile lock icons display correctly for corporate users
seed_data_creation: Created test employees and users during testing (prefixed with test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow Iteration 7 - Major backend refactoring verified. The previous server.py (2534 lines) has been successfully split into 13 modular files: database.py, auth_utils.py, models.py, services/ai_service.py, services/domain_service.py, routes/auth.py, routes/analysis.py, routes/wearables.py, routes/dashboard.py, routes/smartwatch.py, routes/gamification.py, routes/health.py, server.py. All 24 backend API tests passed. All 16 frontend UI tests passed. Key features verified: (1) All API routes work with /api prefix, (2) Auth flow works, (3) Dashboard/Gestor endpoints work, (4) Gamification/billing work, (5) Smartwatch/wearables work, (6) Navbar shows 'Painel Administrativo' button for Gestors, (7) Profile lock icons for corporate users. Admin user (admin@vitalflow.com) is corporate with nivel_acesso=Gestor.

refactoring_verification.status: All endpoints work exactly as before
